raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The State Auditor conducted a study to assess the effectiveness of a 53-year-old statute regarding community-based mental health treatment.",
    "Many individuals with debilitating mental health issues lack intervention treatment or shelter due to varying interpretations of the law.",
    "The Lanterman-Petris-Short Act of 1967 allows for the involuntary commitment of individuals whose mental health disorders prevent them from caring for their basic needs.",
    "Under the LPS Act, individuals may be placed on a 72-hour involuntary hold, which can be extended for 14 days and further extended with court approval.",
    "The audit will provide data and recommendations that are critical for the humane treatment of mentally ill individuals."
  ]
}
```
